non_blocking_issues: 1. [minor -0.1, functional no-impact] addRecentWorkdir dedup still uses trim() not WorkdirPaths.normalize (SettingsManager.kt:162). If the same workdir is added in different slash forms (/proj-a vs proj-a) both get stored. No functional impact (buildWorkdirGroups normalizes to one key; removeRecentWorkdir removes all variants at once) — just 1-2 redundant SharedPreferences entries. In practice the same workdir's slash form comes from the same server and is consistent. Left intentionally (changing add dedup forces a storage-form decision that affects getSessionsForDirectory server-call params).
notes: WorkdirPaths.normalize byte-identical to old SessionsScreen.normalizeDirectory (pure refactor; 11 SessionsScreenTest unchanged). 4 SessionsScreen call sites migrated cleanly. removeRecentWorkdir normalized-equivalence matching closes the real C4 gap (display /proj-a vs stored proj-a/). addRecentWorkdir/getRecentWorkdirs/storage unchanged (server-path integrity preserved). trim().trim('/') boundary analyzed (./proj-a not normalized but never in real server data; //proj-a → proj-a; whitespace → empty skipped by caller). KDoc declares intentional non-handling of ./../inner-//. No regression (all historical tests pass). check.sh GREEN.
